channel.title: Sidhant Gurung
channel.description: Writeups and debugging stories from Sidhant Gurung — EE undergrad at UT Arlington working on hardware, RF, and embedded systems.

item.title: Impostor Syndrome With My First Internship
item.description: In a week I will begin my internship at Qorvo, and I can't help but feel impostor syndrome. Here's how I'm dealing with it, what I'm studying, and why I'm choosing to embrace the process.
